subcodes.first_line: My spirit be a sacrifice unto Thee! Some time ago, through the companionship of Jináb-i-Nabíl-i-'Alí, upon him be the Glory of God, a petition was presented [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لک الفداء چندی قبل بصحابت جناب نبیل قبل علی علیه بهاء الله عریضه عرض شد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of prayer, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
